reviewedCourts.reviewReason: The City of Newark confirms a first-come, first-served combined basketball and handball court at this park, but current city calendars, recreation materials, and broader event searches do not publish a basketball run or event with a concrete schedule at this exact park.

reviewedCourts.courtName: The Silliman Activity and Family Aquatic Center
reviewedCourts.reviewReason: The current four-day Cougars Girls Summer Basketball Camp is documented at the Silliman gym for July 13-16, 2026. The City cancelled its Summer 2026 adult basketball league, and open-play availability changes weekly without a durable published recurring schedule.

nonPublishedFindings.scheduleText: The park has a first-come, first-served combined basketball and handball court, with no public basketball activity schedule.
nonPublishedFindings.reviewReason: Court availability alone does not establish a scheduled basketball run or event.

nonPublishedFindings.courtName: The Silliman Activity and Family Aquatic Center
nonPublishedFindings.scheduleText: Adult Basketball League - Summer 2026; planned for Wednesday nights.
nonPublishedFindings.reviewReason: The City of Newark sports platform explicitly states that the Summer 2026 basketball league was not offered because too few teams registered.

nonPublishedFindings.courtName: The Silliman Activity and Family Aquatic Center
nonPublishedFindings.scheduleText: The gym supports public basketball, but the City directs visitors to call or consult social media for a weekly court schedule because daily availability varies.
nonPublishedFindings.reviewReason: No current durable weekday/start-time schedule was publicly documented at review, so open court availability cannot be normalized into a recurring run.

courtEvents.courtName: The Silliman Activity and Family Aquatic Center
courtEvents.title: Cougars Girls Summer Basketball Camp
courtEvents.sourceTitle: Cougar Girls Summer Basketball Camp is underway | Tri-City Voice
courtEvents.organizerName: Darryl Reina and Newark Memorial Girls Basketball
courtEvents.costText: $149 Newark resident / $159 non-resident; camp T-shirt included
courtEvents.format: Four-day basketball fundamentals and skills camp
courtEvents.uncertainty: The published curriculum includes shooting, ball handling, passing, agility, footwork, defense, spacing, teamwork, and decision-making. No material schedule uncertainty remains after cross-checking the coach-authored announcement, event listing, city registration page, and exact facility.

sessions.title: Cougars Girls Summer Basketball Camp
sessions.scheduleText: Monday-Thursday, July 13-16, 2026, 9:00 AM-noon at the Silliman Activity Center Gymnasium
